name: TradeMe Product Category Sheet
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "It's important to note, when assigning your categories to your products, please ensure the "}, {"text": "Category Code", "bold": true}, {"text": " is used, otherwise it will be rejected during the data feed export."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click here to "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://support.tradevine.com/import-fields/", "children": [{"text": "download the latest list of categories"}]}, {"text": " available for Trade Me."}]}]
